messages.author: swarm
messages.text: BL-474 needs your approval before it can proceed. Reply here with "approve BL-474" (or "reject BL-474 <reason>") to act.

messages.author: swarm
messages.text: BL-474 - Investigate: why does an active ticket's swarm stage become UNKNOWN — is 'not started' always honest, or is the authoritative stage map ever missing a genuinely-held ticket? is complete.
